title: Uruguayan Roasted Potato Gratin
description: A delicious and flavorful side dish that combines the richness of Uruguayan cheese with the simplicity of roasted potatoes.
instructions: In a large bowl, toss the sliced potatoes with olive oil, garlic, salt, and pepper until they are evenly coated.
Spread the potatoes in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast for 20-25 minutes, or until they are golden brown and tender.
While the potatoes are roasting, mix the grated cheese with a pinch of salt and pepper in a separate bowl.
Once the potatoes are done, remove them from the oven and brush them with a little more olive oil if needed.
Transfer the potatoes to a baking dish and top with the cheese mixture.
Return the dish to the oven and bake for an additional 5-7 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
Remove the dish from the oven and garnish with chopped parsley if desired.
Serve the Uruguayan roasted potato gratin hot, straight from the oven.
